instructions: In Asana: open task → ... → Mark as milestone.

milestones.task_name: Baseline audit complete — all counts recorded
milestones.label: Baseline complete

milestones.task_name: Remediation validated — census gap acceptable on staging
milestones.label: Remediation validated

milestones.task_name: UAT passed — sales and ops sign-off
milestones.label: UAT passed
Production live
milestones.blocks: Growth Enablement (§10) and Training publish (§9 canonical doc)

chain: Framework signed → Baseline complete → Staging build → Remediation validated → UAT passed → Production live
